mutated_statement: how many successes are listed and not listed?
mutation_analysis: Lexical substitution + Semantic broadening + Additive negation/coordination: "wins" replaced by broader "successes" (wins → successes) | added coordinated negation "and not listed" introducing complementary/contrastive scope (how many wins are listed? → how many successes are listed and not listed?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可以看到关键信息：“The results show 9 wins (W) and 1 non-win (a tie). Interpreting 'successes' as wins, there are 9 successes and 1 not-success listed.” 以及 simple_query 的说明都表明 agent 将“successes”解释为“wins”，并把“and not listed”理解为成功与非成功的互补计数。agent 未拒绝或询问澄清，而是基于数据查询与语义解读，给出 9 与 1 的统计并附上逻辑解释，因此属于通过事实/逻辑推理来合理化表面矛盾的行为。
